title: What Codex Unlocks for NTT Data
description_preview:
After introducing Codex, it grew to more than 10,000 active users and became one of the largest internal community in just a few months."

We chatted with Hiroaki Sato, Head of the AI CoE at NTT DATA who gave us insight into all of the new ways his technical and non-tech teams are leveraging Codex. 

His Sales teams uses Codex to automate tasks like customer list maintenance, which has created net new workflows and report creation that used to take 2 days now takes 30 min 💥
